minimum_viable_hourly_rate_dkk.rationale: Base at plan-stated 165 DKK/hr. Wide downside reflects high uncertainty around local willingness-to-pay in a remote Arctic market; upside capped near comparable Nordic studio rental ceilings.

taster_conversion_rate.rationale: Base at plan-stated 15%. High uncertainty per source; spread covers typical free-to-paid creative class conversion rates (5-25%) for community arts programs.

rental_shortfall_stress_dkk.rationale: Range explicitly stated in source: 100k-300k DKK Q3 deficit if high hourly rental model fails. Base at midpoint per inferred declaration.

labor_law_overrun_stress_dkk.rationale: Base at source-stated ~300k DKK contractor reclassification liability. High uncertainty; spread reflects severance/benefits variance for 2-FTE-equivalent under Greenlandic employment regimes.

drop_in_revenue_share.rationale: Base at plan-stated 25% drop-in mix target. Medium-uncertainty derived value; spread reflects realistic deviation around the 40/35/25 revenue mix.

year1_revenue_target_dkk.rationale: Bracket around 2M DKK budget envelope: low covers under-target shortfall, high allows modest surplus to replenish contingency. Distinct from budget per source rationale.

monthly_fixed_labor_cost_dkk.rationale: Greenlandic part-time instructor rates roughly 25-40k DKK/month per FTE-equivalent; 2 FTE total. Base mid-range; upside reflects Nuuk wage premium.

drop_in_available_hours_per_year.rationale: Off-peak open-studio hours after course/membership scheduling: roughly 20-30 hrs/week over 40-48 operating weeks. Integer bounds for countable hours.

drop_in_utilization_rate.rationale: Speculative key sensitivity per source. Remote-community studio analogs cluster at 20-50% off-peak fill; base mid-range, wide spread reflects high uncertainty.

kiln_failure_loss_dkk.rationale: Source states 4-8 week shutdown ~200k DKK. Base at source value; spread reflects repair/replacement timing variance and seasonal revenue weight.
